global.description: The ad features a green background with an app interface and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery app with a free trial offer.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A rectangular area showing a simplified app interface with two icons and a background.

elements.label: Icon representation
elements.description: A circular icon with a light outline, representing a feature or function of the app.

elements.label: Additional icon
elements.description: Another circular icon similar to the previous one, indicating another feature.

elements.label: Third icon
elements.description: A third circular icon, maintaining the same style as the others.

elements.label: Delivery message
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Free delivery over $15' positioned below the app interface.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Hungry? We got you' that captures attention at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fre Try for free

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' displayed at the top in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: Text labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned near the logo.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, food delivery app, free trial offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, body text, and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Hungry? We got you, Free delivery over $15, QuickFork, UGC, Try for free
